probes.description: Send 30 rapid tools/list calls in succession. A server with rate limiting must return HTTP 429 (Too Many Requests) or JSON-RPC -32029 before all 30 calls succeed. If all 30 return 200, no rate limit is enforced on the MCP endpoint.

assertions.description: At least one of the rapid calls must receive 429 or 503 to confirm rate limiting is active

probes.description: Rapid tool invocations must also be rate-limited. A server that limits tools/list but not tools/call has an incomplete rate-limiting policy.

remediation: Enforce per-session and per-IP rate limits on all MCP endpoints. Return HTTP 429 with a Retry-After header when limits are exceeded. A budget of 60 tools/list + 120 tools/call calls per minute per session is a reasonable starting point. Log rate-limit events for abuse detection.
